original_product.title: Elegant Toile Pattern Gift Bags Set
original_product.description: Set of three premium paper gift bags with classic gold toile print and silver ribbon ties.

specifications.dimensions: Largest: 35 x 25 x 10 cm; Medium: 30 x 20 x 8 cm; Small: 25 x 15 x 6 cm (estimated)

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A sleek, matte black paper gift bag with a single, abstract gold foil geometric pattern prominently displayed on the front. It features black grosgrain ribbon handles and a matching black satin bow tied neatly at the top. The interior of the bag is a contrasting metallic gold color.
design_alternatives.short_description: Contemporary gift bag featuring minimalist geometric design and luxurious matte finish.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: This design offers a modern, sophisticated aesthetic, distinct from the original's ornate style. The matte black with gold foil provides a premium feel, appealing to a different market segment seeking contemporary elegance and luxury for special occasions or high-end brands.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A soft, pastel pink non-woven fabric drawstring gift pouch, subtly shaped like a heart (or with a heart-shaped silhouette when closed). It features a delicate white lace trim around its top edge and white satin drawstrings for closure. A small, embroidered red heart detail is subtly placed on the front.
design_alternatives.short_description: Adorable heart-shaped fabric pouch, perfect for Valentine's or small romantic gifts.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Directly targets the Valentine's Day market, as hinted by user notes, with a distinct heart shape and soft, romantic materials. The fabric pouch offers reusability and a tactile experience, adding perceived value beyond a single-use paper bag for small, intimate gifts.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A sturdy, natural brown kraft paper gift bag with a simple, single-color black botanical line art illustration (like a fern or a minimalist wildflower sprig) printed on the front, resembling a hand-stamped design. It has twisted paper handles that match the kraft paper, and no ribbon, emphasizing natural simplicity and eco-friendliness.
design_alternatives.short_description: Eco-friendly kraft paper bag with natural, minimalist botanical stamp design.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: This concept taps into the growing demand for sustainable and natural aesthetics. Using kraft paper and simple, single-color printing keeps manufacturing costs low while offering a distinct, earthy, and 'handmade' appeal, suitable for artisanal products or eco-conscious brands.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A medium-sized, sturdy black paper gift bag with a prominent rectangular 'chalkboard' area (matte black, slightly textured to mimic a chalkboard) on the front panel, designed specifically for writing. A small piece of white chalk is tied with natural twine to one of the black twisted paper handles. The rest of the bag is plain black, allowing the chalkboard area to be the focal point.
design_alternatives.short_description: Customizable gift bag with a writeable chalkboard surface for personal messages.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: This design offers a unique interactive element, allowing givers to personalize their gift with a handwritten message or drawing. This feature significantly enhances emotional value and gifting appeal, making the bag part of the gift experience and highly shareable on social media.
